name: Intersolv Inc.
description: Developer of ODBC drivers, data access, and the Virtual Data Warehouse solution. Formed from merger of Sage Software and Index Technologies in 1991.
status_detail: Acquired by Micro Focus in 1998 for $534M; combined entity renamed Merant; DataDirect product line later spun off and acquired by Progress Software in 2003.

name: Aberdeen Group
description: Technology market research and advisory firm that authored this profile.
status_detail: Aberdeen Group was acquired by Harte-Hanks in 2001, then by The Aberdeen Group brand was relaunched; now operates under Aberdeen Strategy & Research.

name: TechGnosis International
description: Brussels, Belgium-based developer of SequeLink, a server-based database-independent architecture for client-server connectivity. Had approximately 4,000 customers at time of acquisition.
status_detail: Acquired by Intersolv on October 23, 1995 for approximately $80 million.

name: Cognos Corp.
description: Business intelligence vendor offering Impromptu query and reporting tool and Powerplay multidimensional database.
status_detail: Acquired by IBM in January 2008 for approximately $5 billion; now operates as IBM Cognos.

name: Business Objects
description: French business intelligence vendor offering BusinessObjects and preparing Mercury decision-support system.
hq_location: Paris, France / San Jose, California, USA
status_detail: Acquired by SAP on January 22, 2008 for approximately $6.8 billion; operates as SAP BusinessObjects.

name: DataDirect Technologies
description: Brand name for Intersolv's ODBC driver and data access product line, including SmartData, Explorer, ODBC Pack, and SequeLink.
status_detail: DataDirect brand survived Intersolv/Merant/Micro Focus transitions; acquired by Progress Software in 2003 for $88M; still active as Progress DataDirect.

name: IBM
description: Technology company referenced as provider of DB2 RDBMS and OS/2 and AIX operating systems.
status_detail: IBM remains an active publicly traded technology corporation.

name: Microsoft
description: Provider of Windows operating systems and OLE 2.0 technology referenced in the product profile.
status_detail: Microsoft remains an active publicly traded technology corporation.

name: Apple
description: Provider of the Macintosh operating system referenced as a supported platform.
status_detail: Apple Inc. remains an active publicly traded technology corporation.

name: Oracle
description: Relational database vendor; Oracle tables referenced as a save target for Intelligent Snapshot feature.
status_detail: Oracle Corporation remains an active publicly traded technology corporation.

name: Micro Focus
description: British software company that acquired Intersolv in 1998.
status_detail: Micro Focus merged with HPE Software in 2017; acquired by OpenText in 2023.

name: Progress Software
description: Technology company that acquired DataDirect Technologies in 2003.
status_detail: Progress Software Corporation (Nasdaq: PRGS) remains actively traded.
